blog_title: Top 5 Reasons Why Couples Love Meghalaya Honeymoon Tours
seo_title: Top 5 Reasons Why Couples Love Meghalaya Honeymoon Tours
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Wed Jul 02 2025

Meghalaya, known as the“Abode of Clouds,”is a breathtakingdestination in Northeast India. In the recent years, the state has become increasingly popular among couples who seek a memorable honeymoon. With the perfect blend of romance and adventure, it steals the hearts of tourists and honeymooners. Here are the top 5 reasons why so many couples love to opt forMeghalaya tour packages including flightsfor their honeymoon escape.

​Amazing scenic beauty

Meghalaya is truly unmatched for its natural beauty. Whether the mystic hills of Sohra (Cherrapunjee), the crystal-clear waters of Dawki River or the root bridges in Mawlynnong Village, each place offers a picturesque backdrop for unforgettable moments. Couples can get a mesmerizing view of the cascading waters when they visit the enchanting waterfalls at places like Nohkalikai Falls and Seven Sisters Falls.​

Less crowded

Unlike popular honeymoon spots that can be packed with tourists, Meghalaya offers a peaceful retreat, allowing couples to connect without the distractions of large crowds. They can go for a scenic drive along the winding mountain roads, a quiet boat ride on Dawki Lake, or an intimate walk through dense forests, in privacy and in each other’s company.

Warm hospitality

The warm and welcoming culture of the state is another plus. Locals in Meghalaya are known for their kindness and friendliness, making visitors feel right at home. Be it in small villages or in larger towns, people in Meghalaya love to embrace newly married couples with insights about their traditions, cuisine, and way of life.

Unique accommodations

Meghalaya offers unique accommodation options perfect for a romantic stay. From charming Khasi huts in the heart of traditional villages to eco-friendly resorts nestled in the hills to cozy treehouses with panoramic views, the best Meghalaya Packages for Couple include all.

Excellent adventure activities

Kayaking on serene lakes, trekking or zip-lining through forests, caving in the depths of Mawsmai Cave or camping under the stars, Meghalaya offers plenty of thrilling activities for couples who love adventure. It can be an unforgettable destination for active couples.

With so much to offer, Meghalaya can be the perfect choice for couples seeking a unique and peaceful honeymoon experience.

FAQ

Is 4 days enough for Meghalaya?

Yes, you can see enough in 4 days. However, if you prefer a more relaxed travel experience, you need more time. A 7-day trip can do justice to the sights and sounds of this beautiful Indian state.

How much will a Meghalaya trip cost?

It depends on what your travel preferences are, the Meghalaya Tour Packages for couple you choose from and what kind of hotel, meal, transportation and other choices you have.

Is Meghalaya good for honeymoon?

Yes, the natural beauty, picturesque surroundings, excellent travel facilities and amenities, adventure activities and rich culture of Meghalaya make it an attractive honeymoon destination.

Which time is best for Meghalaya trip?

The March to June period is the peak season although you might like to visit the state in the October – February period when there are fewer crowds, clear skies and more pleasant weather with little or no rainfall.

Which season is best for Meghalaya tour?

Summer season is preferred the most, to escape from the heat of the plains. However, the post-monsoon and winter season can also be nice times to visit this state.
